nasb.text: For seven days you shall prepare daily a goat for a sin offering; also a young bull and a ram from the flock, without blemish, shall be prepared.

esv.text: For seven days you shall provide daily a male goat for a sin offering; also, a bull from the herd and a ram from the flock, without blemish, shall be provided.

cnv.text: 一連七天，每天你都要預備一頭公山羊為贖罪祭，也要預備一頭公牛犢和羊群中的一隻公綿羊，都要沒有殘疾的。

ccb.text: 一连七天，每天都要献上一只公山羊、一头公牛犊和一只公绵羊作赎罪祭，都不可有残疾。
